prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-SPACE-ENFORCER-SILVER-VAR1-RVW Product Type: TOY_GUN Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: Space Enforcer Toy Blaster With Vibrant Spinning Lights and Sound - Silver Description: Let your kids explore uncharted territory and keep the peace among the community with these awesome Futuristic Space Enforcer Blaster with flashing lights and sound. Featuring an array of flashing colors and sound effects, your child will be able to get creative and imagine themselves in other worlds.

The toy Blaster is exciting and brightly colored which shouts play with me. The space blaster has an detachable magazine that rotates and flashes bright, multicolored LED lights, giving the toy blaster the ultimate cool factor. The sound effects make for realistic component to get your child's creativity flowing.

These toy space blasters will be the life of the party when kids are playing with friends and the perfect creative outlet when they are playing by themselves. Give your child this awesome toy they can venture for hours of occupied play time wherever their mind takes them. Search Terms: boys toy guns toy space blaster galaxy toys super hero kids laser for costumes stocking stuffers action figure pretend play gifts for boys christmas Features: - ULTIMATE SPACE SOLDIERS GEAR: Defenders of our solar system and unknown galaxies beyond, your little boys and girls are busy fighting evil galactic villains; after dinner and homework of course - REAL SOUNDS AND LIGHTS: Made from durable plastic construction to withstand hours of pretend play, the toy gun space soldier galaxy blaster is lightweight, featuring bright lights and cool blasting sound effects to add all the thrill to their latest mission; the toy gun also features a detachable magazine that rotates and flashes bright, multicolored LED lights - FAST ACTION TOY BLASTER: Upon release of the fast-acting trigger, the space soldier toy gun starts an awesome display of colorful, spinning bright lights, then followed by very cool sonic blasting firing sounds, that make saving the galaxy even more fun; the toy gun comes with batteries included, so the superhero action can start right out of the box - SCREEN FREE FUN: A great toy to get your kids off the couch and off tablets, cell phones, computers, laptops and more; the space soldier galaxy blaster toy gun is action packed, boasting some seriously cool pretend play fighting features that will have kids up on their feet in search of the next battle - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 9 inches in length; Material: Plastic; Color: Silver or Blue; Batteries: Included; Warning: Choking Hazard (small parts); Age: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: KidPlay Products Space Enforcer Toy Blaster Silver
